mapper.insert: insert into inquiry ( type, title, content, status, created_date, member_id, guest_name, guest_email, guest_password ) values ( #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, NOW(), #{member_id}, #{guest_name}, #{guest_email}, #{guest_password} )
mapper.select: select i.*, m.nickname as nickname from inquiry i left join member m on i.member_id = m.member_id order by i.inquiry_id desc
select i.*, m.nickname as nickname from inquiry i left join member m on i.member_id = m.member_id where i.inquiry_id = #{inquiry_id}
